title: Erratum-supporting materials for Nesse et al. (2008) Periodontal Inflamed Surface Area: typographical error in Table 1 (maxillary lateral incisor a₅)
description: Companion materials to a Letter to the Editor / Corrigendum being prepared for Journal of Clinical Periodontology, addressing a single decimal-shift typographical error in Table 1 of Nesse et al. (2008). Includes the manuscript drafts, figure with source code, correspondence templates (Dutch + English), and a stand-alone Python implementation plus pytest regression suite that reproduces all 25 anchored ALSA reference points from the original paper's Figure 2a–c within 0.17 mm² (< 0.1 %) using the corrected coefficient.

creators.name: van den Berg, T.H.
creators.affiliation: Practice for Periodontology Haarlem, The Netherlands
